title: No Vanilla Trees
description: A simple datapack to remove vanilla trees
body:
My small datapack to disable most vanilla trees. This datapack basically just change size of vanilla trees that generate by world gen to 0 block with tree by tree. It’s not disable all trees by categories. If there are custom trees that not vanilla, this datapack will no affect. Created this to use with [Tan's Huge Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/tans-huge-trees) mod. Install them together to let huge trees completely take over the forests!

![Birch Forest and Dark Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cUs9IKgJ/images/7aef2aba0c1cf5212a388f50f353d97a53c4b816.png)

Datapack By TannyJung | Started on 21/8/2023
